---
title: "16 Rank Stock Performance"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: create stock performance ranking across 1y, 5y, 10y then assign letter grades.
      # Large nested ifelse is intentionally messy and includes a syntax issue.
  stock_rank <-stock_1yr %>%
    left_join(stock5yr_metrics, by= "symbol") %>%
left_join(stock_10yr, by = "symbol") %>%
 mutate(composite_stock_score = pct_change_1y + pctChange_5YEAR + pct_change_10y)  %>%
   arrange(desc(composite_stock_score)) %>%
  mutate(stock_rank =row_number(),
    grade= ifelse(stock_rank <= 5, "A",
ifelse(stock_rank <= 10,"B",
 ifelse(stock_rank <= 15, "C",
   ifelse(stock_rank <= 22, "D", "F"))))

      # Intent: print ordered rankings.
stock_rank %>% select(symbol, stock_rank, composite_stock_score, grade) %>% print(n =40)
```
